## Summary of Changes
Brief description of what this PR does and why.

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number, if applicable)

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature addition
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] CI/Build improvement

## Checklist
- [ ] Code compiles with `gcc -W -Wall -Wextra -O2`
- [ ] `make check` passes (or tests run successfully with `cd tests && ./test.sh`)
- [ ] `cppcheck --enable=all --suppress=missingIncludeSystem src/ include/` is clean
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased" section
- [ ] Updated man page (`chargen.1`) or documentation if behavior changed
- [ ] If releasing: bumped VERSION in all 3 places (Makefile, include/random_char.h, README)

## Notes
Add any additional context or discussion points here.
